title: Can PenPen Fly
wikitext:
[]: Can PenPen Fly? [spoilers]             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:14 pm Reichu says all the countless tiny details we were previously discussing in the "Interesting Details" thread should get their own topics, so here's one for PenPen and his apparent ability to teleport, first brought up by Seele 00 Text Only . PenPen is with Toji and Hikari when the Tenth Angel breaks into the GeoFront, meaning either he had some way of leaving the house upon the declaration of emergency or Misato handed PenPen off to Kensuke and Toji. That would make sense in Neon Genesis Evangelion , but has NME Misato even met Kensuke and Toji? The only thing I remember her ever saying about either of them is in 1.0 when she mentioned that a student hit Shinji. How did PenPen end up with Kensuke and Toji so quickly and why?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:17 pm -oh lol, i see what you doing thar-. Well, there is no other explanation of Pen-Pen being there. Either Pen-Pen transformed to a flying turtle, either re-production took place somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:19 pm but has NME Misato even met Kensuke and Toji?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:19 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Either Pen-Pen transformed to a flying turtle, either re-production took place somehow.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:21 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:26 pm (Is she snooping on his phone or did they drop by before too?)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:29 pm Taekmkm wrote: Most likely off-screen after the 2nd Angel fight back in 1.0, and she probably met them while dropping them off at the Aquarium.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jun 04, 2010 3:40 pm It's only a big detail if they have more significance in the NME saga, which they don't. Instead of having a pseudo episode 4 where Aida talks to Shinji and patches things up, they have a scene where Touji asks to be punched and that's that. As is, Touji becomes a creepy sister-rubber and Aida goes bromance-feely with Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jun 04, 2010 4:46 pm Toji and Kensuke are there when Misato introduces them all to Asuka near the beginning of 2.0. So it's obvious that they know one another.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 4:52 pm Right, right. I'm pretty amazed they skipped over their meeting. No traces of envying Shinji for living with her remain; the closest we get is Kensuke expressing jealousy that he gets to eat Rei's food.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:00 pm NAveryW wrote: Right, right. I'm pretty amazed they skipped over their meeting. No traces of envying Shinji for living with her remain; the closest we get is Kensuke expressing jealousy that he gets to eat Rei's food.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:07 pm I didn't quite mean it that way. Ignoring NGE entirely, in this situation, you'd think some significance would be attached to Kensuke and Toji discovering Shinji's living situation, or at least that it would be mentioned off handedly, but it never is.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jun 04, 2010 5:20 pm NAveryW wrote: I didn't quite mean it that way. Ignoring NGE entirely, in this situation, you'd think some significance would be attached to Kensuke and Toji discovering Shinji's living situation, or at least that it would be mentioned off handedly, but it never is.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 6:14 pm the_seventh_child wrote: I would not consider this much of a significant event to be honest, but each to his own.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Jun 04, 2010 7:01 pm what i miss is Asuka friendship with classrep....by the time she softned up and could begin a friend shipe, rep,kensuke and toji got fried while escaping geofront

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jun 04, 2010 8:41 pm NAveryW wrote: Usually when protagonists in a film meet each other during the course of the film and their reaction to meeting each other would necessarily be a big one, not showing the encounter in the film and only barely alluding to it until later would come across as very odd.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jun 04, 2010 10:18 pm I guess they don't. Secondary characters, yes?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 04, 2010 10:25 pm It's possible that Pen-Pen has a way to get out of the house in the event of angel attacks (otherwise he could easily get screwed over), and that he just happens to be hanging out with the cutest chick in the evacuation shelter.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 05, 2010 12:55 am Yea, it's called feet. Pen-Pen can't fly, btw, he's a penguin.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jun 05, 2010 1:35 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6JsZbSzMi08

PenPen is with Toji and Hikari when the Tenth Angel breaks into the GeoFront, meaning either he had some way of leaving the house upon the declaration of emergency or Misato handed PenPen off to Kensuke and Toji. That would make sense in Neon Genesis Evangelion , but has NME Misato even met Kensuke and Toji? The only thing I remember her ever saying about either of them is in 1.0 when she mentioned that a student hit Shinji. How did PenPen end up with Kensuke and Toji so quickly and why?
